cells.rationale: Security-boundary guard that must survive --dangerously-skip-permissions with subtle argument-injection invariants across four flag-inspection arms and a fail-closed posture — a hard opus gate, at xhigh for the correctness-critical blast radius spanning exec/write/dispatch vectors.

Security-critical fail-open guard whose correctness crux is a silent-bypass argument-injection invariant (quoted/spaced value-token consumption) — opus by the security gate, but a single well-specified function keeps it at the high default band.
